framework.name: AP2 Liability Framework via Mandate Chain
framework.description: AP2 addresses fraud/liability through cryptographic audit trails: Intent Mandate → Cart Mandate → Payment creates 'non-repudiable' evidence chain. For delegated purchases (human absent), the pre-signed Intent Mandate with explicit rules (price limits, timing, conditions) serves as the authorization record. Accountability question is answered by which mandate was signed and by whom.
framework.raw_quote: This complete sequence—from intent, to cart, to payment—creates a non-repudiable audit trail that answers the critical questions of authorization and authenticity, providing a clear foundation for accountability.

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
